jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Simplilearn
jsonLd.description:
Simplilearn, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
